content.speakerText: I'll be out next week, so can you cover my client calls?
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周不在，你能帮我接客户电话吗？

options.text: Sure, I'll take over. Just update the tracker.
I'm busy, maybe someone else can do it.
Can you handle my emails instead?
I don't know how to answer client calls.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了请求并提出明确的后续动作（更新跟踪表），体现了协作精神。选项2推卸责任，选项3转移任务，选项4表达能力不足，都不符合职场积极交接的语境。

content.speakerText: I'll leave all files in the shared folder and update the status.
content.speakerTextCn: 我会把文件放共享文件夹，更新状态。

options.text: Why are you doing it so late?
I'll do it myself when I get back.
You didn't need to do that.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达感激并认可对方的主动准备。选项2带有指责语气，选项3否定交接意义，选项4轻视对方努力，均不符合职场积极沟通原则。

content.speakerText: I'm leaving for a two-week trip. Can you manage the weekly reports while I'm away?
content.speakerTextCn: 我要出差两周，我走期间你能负责每周的报告吗？

options.text: Of course. Can you share the template and deadline reminders?
I'm not sure I can do it right.
I'll do it, but I need a bonus.

content.explanation: 正确答案接受任务并请求必要资料，体现专业性和主动性。选项2缺乏信心，选项3推卸责任，选项4索要报酬，都不符合职场交接的协作文化。

content.template: I can handle them, but can you send me the ___?
content.hint: 对方请求你接手工作时，你应要求提供关键信息以减少负担
content.knowledgePoint: 交接场景高频词汇（notes 表示工作备注或说明）

content.template: Don't forget to ___ me in the updates.
content.hint: 在协作工具中提醒他人查看更新的常用表达
content.knowledgePoint: 职场协作惯用搭配（tag someone in updates）

content.template: I'll ___ all documents in the shared folder before I leave.
content.hint: 交接时主动说明你将如何整理资料
content.knowledgePoint: 交接场景核心动词搭配（upload files to shared folder）

content.speakerText: I'll be out next week, so can you cover my client calls?
content.speakerTextCn: 我下周不在，你能帮我接客户电话吗？
expectedAnswers: I can take over. Could you send me the call log and key contact info?
Sure, I'll handle them. Just make sure the tracker is updated.
I'm a bit swamped, but I can help if you send me the notes by tomorrow.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确接受或婉拒任务
是否使用场景关键词（cover, take over, notes, tracker）
是否表达清晰、语气礼貌且符合职场习惯

content.speakerText: I'll leave all files in the shared folder and update the status.
content.speakerTextCn: 我会把文件放共享文件夹，更新状态。
expectedAnswers: That's perfect, thanks for organizing everything!
Great! Please tag me when you update so I can follow up.
Thank you so much—you're a lifesaver! I really appreciate this.
evaluationCriteria: 是否表达感谢或认可对方的主动准备
是否使用场景核心表达（perfect, tag me, lifesaver）
是否语气自然、积极，体现团队合作精神

content.speakerText: I'm heading out for a week-long conference. Can you monitor the team’s progress reports?
content.speakerTextCn: 我要去参加为期一周的会议，你能帮忙监控团队的进度报告吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course. Can you share the latest template and who to contact if there are issues?
I’ll keep an eye on them. Just let me know if there’s anything urgent.
I can help, but I’ll need access to the reporting system first.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应请求并提出合理需求
是否使用交接场景关键词（monitor, share, access, update）
是否语言流畅、逻辑清晰，体现专业责任感
